title: corylopasania reflexa
intro: Corylopasania reflexa, also known as the Coral-root, is a flowering plant native to North America. It belongs to the family of coral-root orchids, specifically belonging to the genus Corylopasania. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Corylopasania reflexa include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system, and it can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or dried root for herbal use.
